identity.name: Pasta Privato
identity.address: St Lawrence (11 Church St, next to Notte)

narrative.summary: Hidden 30-seat pasta bar from Yannick Bigourdan & Chef Michael Angeloni (Notte team). $125 8-course tasting or à la carte. Opens March 27. Tajarin with Kaluga caviar, Agnolotti with Iberico pork.
